Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties LLC is present. Represented by Dee Dee McDonald.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Myung Sun Kim is present.
Attorney Megan C. Kiefer representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer with Judge Quidachay in chambers

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. Plaintiff's counsel advises that a dismissal is to be filed.

The trial date of JUN-18-2012 is vacated.
